list.name: 更改
list.comment: 增加了更多的评估指标：Sn、Sp、Precision

task.summary:
汇总有用文件并跑通 结果为 Dual-Stream Ensemble... 样本数: 4194 [基准 1] Old Model (Dual-Tower): ACC=0.7532, AUC=0.8174 [基准 2] New Model (CT-Net) : ACC=0.7515, AUC=0.8110 >>>🏆 策略A：终极双维度融合结果: 权重分配: 0.52 * CT-Net + 0.48 * Old-Model 最佳融合阈值: 0.44 🔥 Final ACC: 0.7649 🔥 Final AUC: 0.8408
>>> 策略 B: Logistic Meta-Learner... 🤖 Stacking LR 结果: ACC: 0.7582 AUC: 0.8398
对ct_src代码进行了整理 该部分修改后所得该部分成绩： Avg ACC: 0.7635 (历史新高) Avg AUC: 0.8104
消融实验： CT-Net w/o ResNet：移除 CNN 残差分支，只保留 Transformer，证明局部特征提取的必要性
消融实验： CT-Net w/o Phys-Gating：移除理化特征的门控乘法运算（直接将 BioVec 送入双分支），证明理化信息动态指导语义特征这一设计的有效性 得到了更好的结果，遂删去门控投影部分
删去门控投影部分后的代码
优化dual-tower代码（删除冗余部分） 该部分结果： 🏆 Old-Model (Dual-Tower) 平均 ACC: 0.7592 🏆 Old-Model (Dual-Tower) 平均 AUC: 0.8186
消融实验： 仅使用 Phys+CKSAAP 训练 LightGBM ======================================== 🏆 Old-Model (Dual-Tower) 平均 ACC: 0.7482 🏆 Old-Model (Dual-Tower) 平均 AUC: 0.8137 ========================================

已完成内部消融实验 (CT-AIP_env) F:\pycharm241023\pythonwork\CT-AIP>python fusion.py >>> [终极集成] 启动 Dual-Stream Ensemble... 样本数: 4194 [基准 1] Old Model (Dual-Tower): ACC=0.7592, AUC=0.8178, MCC=0.4905 [基准 2] New Model (CT-Net) : ACC=0.7554, AUC=0.8159, MCC=0.4852
🏆 终极双维度融合结果: 权重分配: 0.59 * CT-Net + 0.41 * Old-Model 最佳融合阈值: 0.52 🔥 Final ACC: 0.7711 🔥 Final AUC: 0.8424 🔥 Final MCC: 0.5152
>>> 策略 B: Logistic Meta-Learner... 🤖 Stacking LR 结果: ACC: 0.7678 AUC: 0.8424 MCC: 0.5090
✅ 集成成功！性能超越了单模型。

对比试验-外部基线对比实验： 对比传统机器学习 (Traditional ML) (CT-AIP_env) F:\pycharm241023\pythonwork\CT-AIP\dual_tower_src>python baseline_ml.py >>> 加载传统手工特征 (Phys + CKSAAP)... 样本数: 4194, 纯手工特征维度: 2029
>>> 正在评估 SVM (Linear) ... Fold 1: ACC=0.6103, AUC=0.6323, MCC=0.2014 Fold 2: ACC=0.5685, AUC=0.6013, MCC=0.1050 Fold 3: ACC=0.5709, AUC=0.6118, MCC=0.1216 Fold 4: ACC=0.6257, AUC=0.6458, MCC=0.2253 Fold 5: ACC=0.5895, AUC=0.6046, MCC=0.1472 🏆 SVM (Linear) 最终平均结果: ACC=0.5930, AUC=0.6191, MCC=0.1601
>>> 正在评估 Random Forest ... Fold 1: ACC=0.7223, AUC=0.7822, MCC=0.4082 Fold 2: ACC=0.7187, AUC=0.8121, MCC=0.3979 Fold 3: ACC=0.7139, AUC=0.7759, MCC=0.3867 Fold 4: ACC=0.7294, AUC=0.7997, MCC=0.4219 Fold 5: ACC=0.7411, AUC=0.8209, MCC=0.4476 🏆 Random Forest 最终平均结果: ACC=0.7251, AUC=0.7982, MCC=0.4124
>>> 正在评估 XGBoost ... Fold 1: ACC=0.7342, AUC=0.7761, MCC=0.4425 Fold 2: ACC=0.7342, AUC=0.7823, MCC=0.4331 Fold 3: ACC=0.7128, AUC=0.7436, MCC=0.3854 Fold 4: ACC=0.7330, AUC=0.7864, MCC=0.4344 Fold 5: ACC=0.7506, AUC=0.8204, MCC=0.4695 🏆 XGBoost 最终平均结果: ACC=0.7330, AUC=0.7818, MCC=0.4330

对比试验-外部基线对比实验： 对比经典深度学习 (Classic DL) (CT-AIP_env) F:\pycharm241023\pythonwork\CT-AIP\ct_src>python baseline_dl.py >>> 准备 BioVec 数据与特征环境... >>> [BioVec] 开始训练 K-mer Embedding (K=3)... Exception ignored in: 'gensim.models.word2vec_inner.our_dot_float' ✅ BioVec 模型已保存: F:\pycharm241023\pythonwork\CT-AIP\models\biovec.model 词表大小: 7037
==================== 正在训练与评估: TextCNN ==================== Fold 1: ACC=0.6687, AUC=0.7116, MCC=0.3135 Fold 2: ACC=0.6818, AUC=0.7230, MCC=0.3424 Fold 3: ACC=0.7008, AUC=0.7438, MCC=0.3805 Fold 4: ACC=0.6877, AUC=0.7385, MCC=0.3414 Fold 5: ACC=0.6838, AUC=0.7401, MCC=0.3476 🏆 TextCNN 最终平均结果: ACC=0.6845, AUC=0.7314, MCC=0.3451
==================== 正在训练与评估: BiLSTM ==================== Fold 1: ACC=0.6675, AUC=0.6688, MCC=0.2875 Fold 2: ACC=0.6961, AUC=0.7022, MCC=0.3667 Fold 3: ACC=0.6913, AUC=0.7162, MCC=0.3385 Fold 4: ACC=0.6853, AUC=0.7036, MCC=0.3235 Fold 5: ACC=0.6933, AUC=0.7226, MCC=0.3437 🏆 BiLSTM 最终平均结果: ACC=0.6867, AUC=0.7027, MCC=0.3320
==================== 正在训练与评估: Standard Transformer ==================== Fold 1: ACC=0.6853, AUC=0.7334, MCC=0.3281 Fold 2: ACC=0.7163, AUC=0.7559, MCC=0.3956 Fold 3: ACC=0.7092, AUC=0.7807, MCC=0.3962 Fold 4: ACC=0.7020, AUC=0.7402, MCC=0.3853 Fold 5: ACC=0.7088, AUC=0.7571, MCC=0.3887 🏆 Standard Transformer 最终平均结果: ACC=0.7043, AUC=0.7535, MCC=0.3788
增加了更多的评估指标：Sn、Sp、Precision

MESSAGE.value:
汇总有用文件并跑通 结果为 Dual-Stream Ensemble... 样本数: 4194 [基准 1] Old Model (Dual-Tower): ACC=0.7532, AUC=0.8174 [基准 2] New Model (CT-Net) : ACC=0.7515, AUC=0.8110 >>> 策略A：终极双维度融合结果: 权重分配: 0.52 * CT-Net + 0.48 * Old-Model 最佳融合阈值: 0.44 Final ACC: 0.7649 Final AUC: 0.8408
>>> 策略 B: Logistic Meta-Learner... Stacking LR 结果: ACC: 0.7582 AUC: 0.8398
对ct_src代码进行了整理 该部分修改后所得该部分成绩： Avg ACC: 0.7635 (历史新高) Avg AUC: 0.8104
消融实验： CT-Net w/o ResNet：移除 CNN 残差分支，只保留 Transformer，证明局部特征提取的必要性
消融实验： CT-Net w/o Phys-Gating：移除理化特征的门控乘法运算（直接将 BioVec 送入双分支），证明理化信息动态指导语义特征这一设计的有效性 得到了更好的结果，遂删去门控投影部分
删去门控投影部分后的代码
优化dual-tower代码（删除冗余部分） 该部分结果： Old-Model (Dual-Tower) 平均 ACC: 0.7592 Old-Model (Dual-Tower) 平均 AUC: 0.8186
消融实验： 仅使用 Phys+CKSAAP 训练 LightGBM ======================================== Old-Model (Dual-Tower) 平均 ACC: 0.7482 Old-Model (Dual-Tower) 平均 AUC: 0.8137 ========================================

已完成内部消融实验 (CT-AIP_env) F:\pycharm241023\pythonwork\CT-AIP>python fusion.py >>> [终极集成] 启动 Dual-Stream Ensemble... 样本数: 4194 [基准 1] Old Model (Dual-Tower): ACC=0.7592, AUC=0.8178, MCC=0.4905 [基准 2] New Model (CT-Net) : ACC=0.7554, AUC=0.8159, MCC=0.4852
终极双维度融合结果: 权重分配: 0.59 * CT-Net + 0.41 * Old-Model 最佳融合阈值: 0.52 Final ACC: 0.7711 Final AUC: 0.8424 Final MCC: 0.5152
>>> 策略 B: Logistic Meta-Learner... Stacking LR 结果: ACC: 0.7678 AUC: 0.8424 MCC: 0.5090
✅ 集成成功！性能超越了单模型。

对比试验-外部基线对比实验： 对比传统机器学习 (Traditional ML) (CT-AIP_env) F:\pycharm241023\pythonwork\CT-AIP\dual_tower_src>python baseline_ml.py >>> 加载传统手工特征 (Phys + CKSAAP)... 样本数: 4194, 纯手工特征维度: 2029
>>> 正在评估 SVM (Linear) ... Fold 1: ACC=0.6103, AUC=0.6323, MCC=0.2014 Fold 2: ACC=0.5685, AUC=0.6013, MCC=0.1050 Fold 3: ACC=0.5709, AUC=0.6118, MCC=0.1216 Fold 4: ACC=0.6257, AUC=0.6458, MCC=0.2253 Fold 5: ACC=0.5895, AUC=0.6046, MCC=0.1472 SVM (Linear) 最终平均结果: ACC=0.5930, AUC=0.6191, MCC=0.1601
>>> 正在评估 Random Forest ... Fold 1: ACC=0.7223, AUC=0.7822, MCC=0.4082 Fold 2: ACC=0.7187, AUC=0.8121, MCC=0.3979 Fold 3: ACC=0.7139, AUC=0.7759, MCC=0.3867 Fold 4: ACC=0.7294, AUC=0.7997, MCC=0.4219 Fold 5: ACC=0.7411, AUC=0.8209, MCC=0.4476 Random Forest 最终平均结果: ACC=0.7251, AUC=0.7982, MCC=0.4124
>>> 正在评估 XGBoost ... Fold 1: ACC=0.7342, AUC=0.7761, MCC=0.4425 Fold 2: ACC=0.7342, AUC=0.7823, MCC=0.4331 Fold 3: ACC=0.7128, AUC=0.7436, MCC=0.3854 Fold 4: ACC=0.7330, AUC=0.7864, MCC=0.4344 Fold 5: ACC=0.7506, AUC=0.8204, MCC=0.4695 XGBoost 最终平均结果: ACC=0.7330, AUC=0.7818, MCC=0.4330

对比试验-外部基线对比实验： 对比经典深度学习 (Classic DL) (CT-AIP_env) F:\pycharm241023\pythonwork\CT-AIP\ct_src>python baseline_dl.py >>> 准备 BioVec 数据与特征环境... >>> [BioVec] 开始训练 K-mer Embedding (K=3)... Exception ignored in: 'gensim.models.word2vec_inner.our_dot_float' ✅ BioVec 模型已保存: F:\pycharm241023\pythonwork\CT-AIP\models\biovec.model 词表大小: 7037
==================== 正在训练与评估: TextCNN ==================== Fold 1: ACC=0.6687, AUC=0.7116, MCC=0.3135 Fold 2: ACC=0.6818, AUC=0.7230, MCC=0.3424 Fold 3: ACC=0.7008, AUC=0.7438, MCC=0.3805 Fold 4: ACC=0.6877, AUC=0.7385, MCC=0.3414 Fold 5: ACC=0.6838, AUC=0.7401, MCC=0.3476 TextCNN 最终平均结果: ACC=0.6845, AUC=0.7314, MCC=0.3451
==================== 正在训练与评估: BiLSTM ==================== Fold 1: ACC=0.6675, AUC=0.6688, MCC=0.2875 Fold 2: ACC=0.6961, AUC=0.7022, MCC=0.3667 Fold 3: ACC=0.6913, AUC=0.7162, MCC=0.3385 Fold 4: ACC=0.6853, AUC=0.7036, MCC=0.3235 Fold 5: ACC=0.6933, AUC=0.7226, MCC=0.3437 BiLSTM 最终平均结果: ACC=0.6867, AUC=0.7027, MCC=0.3320
==================== 正在训练与评估: Standard Transformer ==================== Fold 1: ACC=0.6853, AUC=0.7334, MCC=0.3281 Fold 2: ACC=0.7163, AUC=0.7559, MCC=0.3956 Fold 3: ACC=0.7092, AUC=0.7807, MCC=0.3962 Fold 4: ACC=0.7020, AUC=0.7402, MCC=0.3853 Fold 5: ACC=0.7088, AUC=0.7571, MCC=0.3887 Standard Transformer 最终平均结果: ACC=0.7043, AUC=0.7535, MCC=0.3788
增加了更多的评估指标：Sn、Sp、Precision

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: 增加了更多的评估指标：Sn、Sp、Precision
